title: Candidate Source Tracking Tools: 2026 Platform Comparison
description: Comprehensive review of 2026 Candidate Source Tracking Tools, helping staffing agencies track candidate sources.
content:
Candidate Source Tracking Overview

Source tracking is important for staffing agencies to track where candidates come from. Staffing agencies need source tracking tools including source attribution, channel tracking, source analysis. Candidate source tracking tools help agencies achieve source attribution, channel tracking, source analysis.

Source Tracking Platform Reviews

Bullhorn Source Tracking

Bullhorn provides CRM-integrated source tracking features. Source attribution features attribute candidate sources. Channel tracking features track sourcing channels. Source analysis features analyze source patterns.

Selection Recommendations

Staffing agencies selecting candidate source tracking tools should focus on source attribution, channel tracking, source analysis, and cost structure.
author: Source Tracking Research Institute
